name: unsb_tool
description: Run local UNSB MRI enhancement on the active image source and attach the enhanced preview to the Image Review card.

help.summary: Run UNSB enhancement on the active image source and add the enhanced output to the Image Review Studio card.

modes.name: run
modes.description: Enhance the active image with the local UNSB checkpoint.

options.name: epoch
options.description: Checkpoint prefix to load from the UNSB checkpoint directory.

options.name: tau
options.description: Noise parameter used during the SDE inference loop.

options.name: crop_size
options.description: Resize and center-crop size used before enhancement.

options.name: gpu
options.description: GPU id to use. Set to -1 for CPU.

options.name: deterministic
options.description: Disable stochastic noise for reproducible output.

options.name: save_channel
options.description: Optional output channel index to save as grayscale.

notes: Uses the active image source by default.
The enhanced preview is attached to the existing Image Review card.
